name: Bastion Merge
author: Asté
description: Merge your army -> Defend your wall -> Survive the waves ! Tags: merge, tower-defense, puzzle, medieval, knights
top5_comments: thePixelXb_: Nice blend of Vampire Survivor and 2048, challenging reflexes and tower-defense strategy. Aim-only mechanic feels underpowered against large wave numbers. Suggest scatter-shot toggle for higher-level units. | Asté: Thank you for the comment! The range of early units is limited - prioritize your strongest soldiers on the front line. Resist the urge to merge too quickly: two average soldiers side by side beat a single elite unit. | ChazBCook: Really enjoyed this cart - super easy to pick up and understand right away. Merge mechanic clicked fast and felt satisfying. Lost coverage after over-merging and could not recover. Still a fun concept. Wave 15 on first try. | thePixelXb_: (Follow-up screenshot posted)
